landing_page.subtitle: Real results.
landing_page.slogan: Edumock.uz quality education with your quality app
landing_page.description: Edumock.uz is an educational platform contributing to the development of training centers in Uzbekistan, which fully undertakes the organization of the Speaking part of CEFR exams in training centers and guarantees students quality preparation.

guide_dialog.title: Guide
guide_dialog.description: Important instructions for correct application usage:
guide_dialog.rule1_text: For the application to function correctly, please use only one browser (e.g., Google Chrome).
guide_dialog.rule2_text: After conducting a test with a student, please download the recording from the site within 1 hour.
guide_dialog.rule3_text: Recorded tests are stored in the browser's local storage. Clearing browser history, cache, or cookies may lead to the loss of your recordings.
guide_dialog.rule4_text: When starting the test, select 'Entire Screen' in the pop-up window, check the 'Also share system audio' box, and click the 'Share' button. The exam will begin after this.
